Back to browse
Sci-Fi

Project Hail Mary

Andy Weir

Rating

4.9 / 5

Pages

480

Published

2021

A lone astronaut must save the earth from disaster. He remembers nothing of who he is or how he got here — and one discovery could mean the end for humanity.
